name: Spaghetti Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Cottage Cheese or Ricotta Cheese
8 Ounces Stewed Tomatoes, undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Stir together cooked spaghetti, butter, Parmesan cheese, and eggs. Spoon the mixture into a buttered 9-inch pie plate, pressing to form a crust.
3. Spread cottage or ricotta cheese over the crust.
4. Brown ground beef in a skillet and drain the fat. Stir in onion, green pepper, tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, and garlic powder.
5. Pour the meat mixture over the cottage/ricotta cheese.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
